judge_reason: Both sides agree it is a hand-drawn sketch of a device; Description B adds specific labels and measurements not mentioned in A, but they do not contradict each other.
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch on dark background (appears to be a photographic negative or blueprint-style reproduction). The sketch depicts a two-part device connected by a cable.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Hand-drawn technical sketch on a dark background showing a curved object labeled “8'” across the top, connected by a slanted line labeled “5'” and “DARK CABLE” to a rectangular block labeled “BALL OR A CANISTER”; several arrows label parts as “SILVER,” with “EXHIBIT I” and “CONFIDENTIAL” stamped on the page.*
